headline: Is General Dynamics Corporation (GD) The Best Defense Stock on Big Military Contracts?
summary: General Dynamics Corporation (NYSE:GD) is one of the best defense stocks that will skyrocket. On April 14, General Dynamics Corp (NYSE:GD) secured three US Navy contracts worth $273.45 million. The company’s General Dynamics NASSCO-Norfolk secured a $183.23 million firm-fixed-price contract for the maintenance, modernization, and repair of USS Truxtun (DDG 103). Work on the contract […]
